title: My Absurd Skill Is Unexpectedly Useful
overview: One day, Tsuyoshi Mukohda, an extremely ordinary salaryman, gets caught up in a hero summons being performed in another world. At the time of his summoning, he receives a unique skill known as "Online Grocery", that allows him to bring food ingredients and seasonings from his original world. Even though this skill seems plain at first glance, the food he brings into this new world has an absurd effect...!?

title: The Salient Familiar Is a Living Legend
overview: After the legendary wolf monster Fenrir got attracted to the delicious smell of Mukohda's food and signed the Familiar Contract with him, Mukohda decides to register with the Guild in Fallières his next stop.

title: My Super Power Is All About Cooking
overview: After registering with both the Merchant's and the Adventurer's Guilds, Mukohda immediately decides to take on a beginner’s quest. However, when they deliver the monsters that Fel caught during their quest to the Guild, they find out that most of these monsters are B-rank or higher.

title: Cannot Start the Journey Without a Map
overview: Mukohda asks Fel to teach him how to use magic after witnessing his wind magic. However, when things do not seem to go well, Fel decides to start a Spartan training regimen for him.

title: The Goddess of Wind Has a Sweet Tooth
overview: Mukohda  and Fel arrive at a large lake, where they catch some fish and have their usual meal. But right when they start eating inside the barrier that keeps monsters at bay, a baby slime appears out of nowhere...?

title: Growth Happens Out of Nowhere
overview: The place Fel decides to bring Mukohda to get some battle experience ends up being a creepy dungeon. Even so, Mukohda gets ready for battle and increases his stats by eating a meal from his original world using the “Online Grocery”. However...

title: Dances with Wolves and Monsters
overview: Mukohda and his familiars dash through the forest, after strengthening their bonds in the dungeon. However, they soon find themselves in the territory of dangerous monsters and, just like Mukohda expected, surrounded by a pack of orthros...

title: All of the Boss Monsters Are Tasty
overview: After Mukohda rescues a traveling caravan from a band of bandits, they set out together for the great city of Karelina. But when Mukohda visits the Adventurer’s Guild in the city, he gets notified that his membership was revoked...?

title: Hunting Quests Are All About Meat and Money
overview: Mukohda gets summoned by the guild master after defeating an entire settlement of goblins while finishing a guild request. Although Mukohda didn't want to make a big deal out of it, he receives a high-ranking quest directly from the guild master...?

title: My Two Familiars Are Too Overpowered
overview: Mukohda and his familiars receive a request to head towards a mine and hunt down the metal lizard that inhabits it. Instead, they run into a rare mithril lizard. After Mukohda defeats the lizard, with the help of Fel and Sui, Fel turns his interest towards a different and tastier prey...?

title: Doing Business for The Missus
overview: Lambert consults Mukohda about a gift for his wife. When Mukohda suggests a certain product he purchased from the online grocery, it leads to an unexpected situation. Meanwhile, a pack of dangerous monsters, called wyverns, are approaching the town...?

title: Adventures Are as Countless as Varieties of Food
overview: After easily defeating the pack of dangerous yet powerful wyverns, Mukohda and his familiars receive praise not only from the guild, but also from the entire town. Unfazed by the attention, Mukohda goes out to look for a certain thing that he's always wanted to get in ever since he got summoned to this world.

title: My New Friend Is Absurd
overview: Mukouda meets a pixie dragon who wants to seal a contract to eat delicious things.

title: I Will Process the Earth Dragon
overview: Mukouda, Fel, Sui and Dora arrive at the Dolan City, where they are greeted by a character who loves dragons.

title: Guaranteed Three-Star Earth Dragon Steak
overview: With a new knife in hand, Elrand processes the earth dragon. Meanwhile, Mukohda makes some preparations...

title: The Dungeon with Ready-Made Food
overview: Now that preparations are made, Mukohda and his familiars tackle the dungeon with plenty of provisions.

title: Is the Enemy Monsters or Hunger?
overview: Mukohda and his familiars continue exploring deeper into the dungeon, while making sure never to go hungry.

title: Online Grocery Levels Up
overview: Mukohda and his familiars conquer the dungeon and decide to take a little break.

title: Street Snacking Heaven
overview: With too many gems for the Adventurer's guild to handle, Mukohda gets lunch and heads to the Merchant's guild.

title: Do Blacksmiths Dream of BBQ?
overview: Mukohda wants a custom-made grill, but the smithies are all refusing. He needs a secret weapon.

title: A Vacation Along with Subjugation
overview: Mukohda plans to leave Dolan, but has takes a rest day while Fel and Dora-chan exercise.

title: Dinner Starts with One Dish
overview: Since they've come to Nijhoff, Mukohda decides it's time to finally upgrade his dishware.

title: Fight?! The Great Sea Battle
overview: Mukohda and his crew reach Berléand and find out that they have to take care of a problem before they can eat.

title: A New Return
overview: After Enjoying their time in Berleland, Mukohda and his crew set out for their return adventure!
